description: Brimming with retro polka dots and dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, these shoes from the Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse is also called Chucks, and comes in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite.Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot High ankle for extra support to the upper ankle and for style Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Metallic eyelets on the sides for ventilation Midsole Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugsand grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
